title: Hello World
description:
Every Java journey begins with Hello World. This program should print "Hello, World!" to the console, but there are syntax errors.

Fix the code so it compiles and prints the correct message.
hints: Java class names must match the filename and use proper capitalization.
The main method signature must be: public static void main(String[] args)

checks.failMessage: Main method parameter should be String[] args.
Add semicolon and fix the message to 'Hello, World!'.
Output should be exactly 'Hello, World!' with comma and exclamation.
